name: Hardcoded Temporary Path
description: Hardcoded /tmp/ paths are not portable and may be insecure on multi-user systems.
rationale: Using hardcoded /tmp/ paths is not portable across platforms and is susceptible to symlink attacks. Use tempfile module instead.
compliant_code:
import tempfile
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', delete=False) as f:
    f.write(data)
